content:
# elizaos/cloud Daily Update (Apr 28, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 28, 2026, focused on infrastructure modernization and authentication stability. Key achievements include the complete removal of the Vercel AI Gateway in favor of OpenRouter and a fix for CLI login authentication hangs.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**AI Provider Infrastructure Refactor**
*   Eliminated the Vercel AI Gateway dependency across the entire codebase.
*   Integrated OpenRouter as the primary AI provider for non-Groq traffic, with OpenAI and Anthropic direct providers configured as failover targets.
*   Updated numerous service and provider files to support this transition ([#482](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/482)).

**Authentication and CLI Stability**
*   Resolved an issue where the `/auth/cli-login` page would hang indefinitely when encountering stale Steward or Privy tokens.
*   Implemented auto-clearing for stale tokens when a 401 error is received, ensuring a smoother authentication flow ([#480](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/480)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#483](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/483): Push develop to production.
*   [#481](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/pull/481): docs: design spec for Claude / Codex sub-agent ↔ Milady runtime bridge.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

**Dependency Dashboard ([#79](https://github.com/elizaos/cloud/issues/79))**
*   Development is currently gated by a dependency issue where `bun install` is broken on `develop` due to an unpublished transitive dependency in `@elizaos/plugin-todo`.
*   A stack of PRs has been opened to address various dependency updates (Node v24, TypeScript v6, etc.), but these are blocked until the rolodex override ([#7146](https://github.com/elizaOS/eliza/pull/7146)) is merged.
*   Contributors noted that CI workflows for code quality have not been running correctly on `develop`, allowing some typecheck failures and script errors to persist unnoticed.
